response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or navigation systems, and shows no evidence of distributed systems or map tiling work critical to the role.
strengths: Proven geospatial project experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or map pipelines
Lack of evidence in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or navigation data optimization
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not low-latency systems or geospatial tiling
